name: Readytech Holdings Limited
analysis: RDY's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 48% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.4600, stop A$1.3266, target A$1.7650 (2.29:1) — then trail it.
